mapper.select:
select category_id, category_name, category_code, sort_num, status, description, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from tz_category where del_flag = '0'
and category_name like concat('%', #{categoryName}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by sort_num asc, category_id asc

select category_id, category_name, category_code, sort_num, status, description, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from tz_category where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' order by sort_num asc, category_id asc

select category_id, category_name, category_code, sort_num, status, description, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from tz_category where category_id = #{categoryId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into tz_category(category_name, category_code, sort_num, status, description, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{categoryName}, #{categoryCode}, #{sortNum}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update:
update tz_category set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where category_id in
#{categoryId}
mapper.select: select p.profile_id, p.user_id, p.college, p.grade, p.major, p.introduction, p.status, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.avatar from tz_user_profile p inner join sys_user u on u.user_id = p.user_id where p.user_id = #{userId} and p.del_flag = '0' and u.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into tz_user_profile(user_id, college, grade, major, introduction, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{userId}, #{college}, #{grade}, #{major}, #{introduction}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.select:
select u.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.avatar, p.college, p.grade, p.major, p.introduction, u.create_time, (select count(1) from tz_question q where q.user_id = u.user_id and q.del_flag = '0') as question_count, (select count(1) from tz_answer a where a.user_id = u.user_id and a.del_flag = '0') as answer_count, (select count(1) from tz_question_favorite f where f.user_id = u.user_id) as favorite_count from sys_user u left join tz_user_profile p on p.user_id = u.user_id and p.del_flag = '0' where u.del_flag = '0' and u.user_type = '02'
and u.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
and u.nick_name like concat('%', #{nickName}, '%')
and p.college like concat('%', #{college}, '%')
order by u.user_id desc
mapper.sql: q.question_id, q.category_id, q.user_id, q.title, q.content, left(q.content, 120) as summary, q.status, q.reject_reason, q.is_anonymous, q.view_count, q.answer_count, q.favorite_count, q.create_time, c.category_name, u.user_name as publisher_name, u.nick_name as publisher_nick_name
mapper.select:
select ,
if(f.question_id is null, 'N', 'Y') as favorited
'N' as favorited
from tz_question q left join tz_category c on c.category_id = q.category_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = q.user_id
left join tz_question_favorite f on f.question_id = q.question_id and f.user_id = #{userId}
where q.del_flag = '0' and q.status = '1'
and q.category_id = #{query.categoryId}
and (q.title like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') or q.content like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
order by q.create_time desc

select ,
if(f.question_id is null, 'N', 'Y') as favorited
'N' as favorited
from tz_question q left join tz_category c on c.category_id = q.category_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = q.user_id
left join tz_question_favorite f on f.question_id = q.question_id and f.user_id = #{userId}
where q.question_id = #{questionId} and q.del_flag = '0'

select , 'N' as favorited from tz_question q left join tz_category c on c.category_id = q.category_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = q.user_id where q.del_flag = '0' and q.user_id = #{userId} order by q.create_time desc

select , 'Y' as favorited from tz_question_favorite f inner join tz_question q on q.question_id = f.question_id and q.del_flag = '0' left join tz_category c on c.category_id = q.category_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = q.user_id where f.user_id = #{userId} and q.status = '1' order by f.create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into tz_question(category_id, user_id, title, content, status, reject_reason, is_anonymous, view_count, answer_count, favorite_count, create_time) values(#{categoryId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{rejectReason}, #{isAnonymous}, #{viewCount}, #{answerCount}, #{favoriteCount}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update tz_question set view_count = ifnull(view_count, 0) + 1 where question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.select: select q.question_id, q.category_id, q.user_id, q.title, q.content, q.status, q.reject_reason, q.is_anonymous, q.view_count, q.answer_count, q.favorite_count, q.create_by, q.create_time, q.update_by, q.update_time, c.category_name, u.user_name as publisher_name, u.nick_name as publisher_nick_name from tz_question q left join tz_category c on c.category_id = q.category_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = q.user_id where q.question_id = #{questionId} and q.del_flag = '0'

select a.answer_id, a.question_id, a.user_id, a.content, a.status, a.reject_reason, a.is_anonymous, a.like_count, a.create_time, q.title as question_title, u.user_name as publisher_name, u.nick_name as publisher_nick_name from tz_answer a left join tz_question q on q.question_id = a.question_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = a.user_id where a.question_id = #{questionId} and a.del_flag = '0' and a.status = '1' order by a.create_time asc

select a.answer_id, a.question_id, a.user_id, a.content, a.status, a.reject_reason, a.is_anonymous, a.like_count, a.create_time, q.title as question_title, u.user_name as publisher_name, u.nick_name as publisher_nick_name from tz_answer a left join tz_question q on q.question_id = a.question_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = a.user_id where a.user_id = #{userId} and a.del_flag = '0' order by a.create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into tz_answer(question_id, user_id, content, status, reject_reason, is_anonymous, like_count, create_time) values(#{questionId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{status}, #{rejectReason}, #{isAnonymous}, #{likeCount}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select a.answer_id, a.question_id, a.user_id, a.content, a.status, a.reject_reason, a.is_anonymous, a.like_count, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, q.title as question_title, u.user_name as publisher_name, u.nick_name as publisher_nick_name from tz_answer a left join tz_question q on q.question_id = a.question_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = a.user_id where a.answer_id = #{answerId} and a.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into tz_question_favorite(question_id, user_id, create_time) values(#{questionId}, #{userId}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from tz_question_favorite where question_id = #{questionId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from tz_question_favorite where question_id = #{questionId} and user_id = #{userId}

select (select count(1) from tz_question where del_flag = '0') as question_count, (select count(1) from tz_answer where del_flag = '0') as answer_count, (select count(1) from tz_category where del_flag = '0') as category_count, (select count(1) from tz_question where del_flag = '0' and status = '0') as pending_question_count, (select count(1) from tz_answer where del_flag = '0' and status = '0') as pending_answer_count, (select count(1) from tz_question_favorite) as favorite_count
